items.title: Boeing Cargo Plane Veers Off Runway At Hong Kong Airport, Claims Two Lives
items.description: On Sunday, a cargo plane from Boeing Co. (NYSE: BA) operated by Emirates veered off the runway at Hong Kong International Airport, resulting in two fatalities.

items.title: Tesla, Netflix set to report earnings as US-China trade fight turns 'unsustainable': What to watch this week
items.description: As investors enters shutdown week three, a US-China trade war, credit gesticulation, and an incoming oil glut are weighing on the market.

items.title: Wall Street Breakfast:
items.description: Get the latest stock market updates, Q3 earnings highlights, and expert investment strategies amid economic uncertainty.
